system.description:
The ability to exert oneself physically. You may add the Athletics skill to appropriate physical characteristic rolls. This skill is never rolled unskilled.
  • Climbing a rough cliff without tools: Athletics/STR 8+
  • Running a marathon: Athletics/END 10+
  • Propping up a boulder to prevent a cave collapse: Athletics/STR 12+
  • Walking a tightrope: Athletics/DEX 10+
system.shortdescr: Physical exertion; add to appropriate physical characteristic rolls. Never unskilled.
